title: Midnight Italian Almond Gnocchi Delight
description: A simple yet satisfying Italian dish, perfect for a late-night craving. This recipe combines soft gnocchi with crunchy almonds and a touch of Italian seasoning.
instructions: Cook gnocchi according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium heat.
Add garlic and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add sliced almonds and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted.
Add cooked gnocchi to the skillet and toss with almonds, garlic, and Italian seasoning.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Transfer the gnocchi mixture to a baking dish and top with Parmesan cheese.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve immediately.
